cookies.title: Session Cookies (JSON)
cookies.description: Your session cookies exported from Chrome after logging in via Google. Use the 'Cookie-Editor' extension → Export → JSON. Paste the full JSON array here.

targetClasses.title: Target Classes
targetClasses.description: Classes to automatically book. Each entry requires 'day' and 'time'. Optionally add 'classType' (partial match against class name, e.g. 'Skupinová') and/or 'instructor' (partial match, e.g. 'Březíková') to narrow down which slot to book. Leave them out to book the first available slot at that day/time.

bookingUrl.title: Booking Page URL
bookingUrl.description: Direct URL to the class schedule/booking page (optional — leave empty to use the default).

minDaysAhead.title: Minimum days ahead
minDaysAhead.description: Never book a class that starts sooner than this many days from now. Default is 3 — protects against accidentally booking something happening this week.

dryRun.title: Dry Run (no actual booking)
dryRun.description: If enabled, the Actor will check for available classes but NOT book them. Useful for testing.
